title: Special Demand Type Definitions
description: Defines the taxonomy of special demand point types for the Subway Builder mod. The schema is owned by the Subway-Builder-Modded org and expanded only through versioned PRs. Fields annotated with 'x-template-locked: true' are immutable — mappers must not alter them. Fields annotated with 'x-user-extensible: true' (sub_types, metadata) may be added or overridden per map.

version.description: Schema version. Incremented on each PR that adds or modifies type definitions.

types.description: All special demand type definitions. Must include every entry listed in $defs/type_templates. Order is not significant.

LocalizedString.description: A dictionary of locale-keyed display strings. '__default__' is the unlocalized fallback; additional keys are BCP 47 locale tags (e.g. 'ja', 'en', 'es').

DemandType.description: A special demand category. Template-locked fields are set by the org schema and must not be altered by mappers. User-extensible fields may be added or overridden per map.

id.description: Machine-readable identifier. Must match a value in type_templates.

code.description: Short uppercase alphabetic code used as a point ID prefix in demand_data.

label.description: Human-readable category name for UI display.

description.description: Short description of what this category contains.

icon.description: Lucide icon name (https://lucide.dev) for UI rendering.

sub_types.description: Optional narrower classifications within this type. Mappers may add sub-types relevant to their region. Only include when more than one sub-type exists.

metadata.description: Freeform key-value pairs for auditing, mod plugins, or mapper-specific extensions.

DemandSubType.description: A sub-classification within a parent demand type.

id.description: Machine-readable identifier. Must be unique within the parent type's sub_types.

icon.description: Optional Lucide icon override. If omitted, inherits the parent type icon.

type_templates.description: Canonical type definitions. Each entry defines the template-locked field values for a mandatory type. Ingestion MUST verify: (1) every template ID is present in the 'types' array, (2) template-locked fields (id, code, label, description, icon) match exactly. This section is not used for JSON Schema structural validation — it is a machine-readable contract consumed by application-level validators.
